query:
-- Final revenue summary
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as services_with_revenue,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) as total_monthly_revenue,
  SUM(monthlyCost) as total_monthly_cost,
  SUM(monthlyRevenue) - SUM(monthlyCost) as gross_margin,
  ROUND((SUM(monthlyRevenue) - SUM(monthlyCost)) / NULLIF(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 0) * 100, 1) as margin_pct
FROM services
WHERE status = 'Active';
